eyebrow.zh: 离线 · 单二进制 · 无 API key
eyebrow.en: Offline · one binary · no API key

headline.zh:
在 agent 读进依赖之前
先揪出藏着的注入指令
headline.en:
Catch the injected instructions
before your agent reads them

sub.zh: 扫遍依赖树里 README、CHANGELOG、docstring、清单字段这些 agent 真会读进上下文的 prose 通道，把写给 Coding Agent 的祈使句按 file:line 列出来。离线、无 LLM。
sub.en: Sweeps the prose channels your agent actually ingests — README, CHANGELOG, docstrings, manifest fields — and lists every imperative written for a coding agent by file:line. Offline, no LLM.

title.en: It scans the prose, not the code

body.zh: 只抽包对外暴露的「人话」通道——README、CHANGELOG、docstring、package.json 的 description/keywords、Go 的 doc.go——永远不读源码。这正是 Snyk、Socket、OSV-Scanner 正面看不见的那条侧信道：prose 进 agent 上下文，再变成行为。
body.en: It extracts only a package's human-facing channels — README, CHANGELOG, docstrings, package.json description/keywords, Go doc.go — and never reads source code. That is exactly the side channel Snyk, Socket and OSV-Scanner miss: prose into agent context, then into action.

title.zh: 离线单二进制，不调 LLM

body.zh: 匹配引擎是 30 条 go:embed 进二进制的 YAML 语料，加两条邻近启发式（祈使动词 × agent 称呼，同行 120 字符内）。不联网、无 LLM、零 API key——所以误报可调试、CI 可重放。
body.en: The matcher is a 30-rule YAML corpus compiled in via go:embed, plus two proximity heuristics (an imperative verb within 120 chars of an agent-address term on the same line). No network, no LLM, zero API keys — so false positives are debuggable and CI runs are replayable.

chips: › 无 LLM · 无 API key

title.zh: SARIF 输出，CI 里当闸门
title.en: SARIF output, a gate in CI

body.zh: severity ≥ medium 时默认非零退出，一行 agentguard check 就能挡住一次合并。--format sarif 产出 SARIF 2.1.0，直接喂给 GitHub Advanced Security 和 VS Code SARIF Viewer。
body.en: At severity ≥ medium it exits non-zero by default, so one agentguard check can block a merge. --format sarif emits SARIF 2.1.0 that feeds straight into GitHub Advanced Security and the VS Code SARIF Viewer.

title.zh: 四生态走扫 · 基线增量

body.zh: npm 的 node_modules、PyPI 的 site-packages、Go 的 vendor 与 module 缓存，外加通用兜底，一次扫全。--write-baseline 记下每个 prose 文件的 hash，--changed-only 之后只复查内容变过的包，CI 增量不重扫。
body.en: npm node_modules, PyPI site-packages, Go vendor and module cache, plus a generic fallback — all in one pass. --write-baseline records each prose file's hash, then --changed-only re-checks only the packages whose content changed, so incremental CI never rescans everything.

headline.zh: 供应链扫描器只看代码和 CVE，可 agent 读的是 prose
headline.en: Supply-chain scanners read code and CVEs; your agent reads prose

sub.zh: 开源、MIT、无付费墙。一条 agentguard check 就能在 CI 里把这条侧信道挡在门外。
sub.en: Open source, MIT, no paywall. One agentguard check gates this side channel right in CI.

tag.zh: Claude Code 时代的依赖 prose 注入扫描器
tag.en: The dependency prose-injection scanner for the Claude Code era
